scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c "#6366f1","#8b5cf6" "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n server,web,desktop -c "#6366f1","#8b5cf6","#f0abfc" "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build:win -w apps/desktop
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
